tools.name: vouch_score
tools.description: Check whether a counterparty is SAFE TO PAY before sending money. Given a URL or host, returns a 0-100 trust score and risk band (low/medium/high/critical), detecting scams, phishing, and known-malicious endpoints via threat feeds, domain risk heuristics, and a community reputation graph. Call this

tools.name: vouch_report
tools.description: Report a host as a scam/bad actor ('flag') or as trustworthy ('vouch'), improving Vouch's community reputation graph for everyone's future payment-trust checks. Free.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: vouch_score · Public sink: vouch_score.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: vouch_score · Public sink: vouch_score

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
